profile.loginPrompt: Sign in to access your account

article1.title: Article 1 – Purpose
article1.content: These Terms and Conditions govern the use of the CasaFix mobile application, a platform connecting homeowners with qualified artisans on the Costa del Sol (Marbella, Estepona, Fuengirola, Málaga and surrounding areas).

article2.title: Article 2 – Access
article2.content: Access to the Application is free. Some services may require creating a user account. Users agree to provide accurate information and maintain the confidentiality of their login credentials.

article3.title: Article 3 – Services
article3.content: CasaFix connects users with artisans for: plumbing, electrical, locksmith, heating, AC, pest control, appliances, glazing, small works, renovation, pool and garden services. Displayed prices are indicative. A free, no-obligation quote is provided before any work.

article4.title: Article 4 – Pricing & Payment
article4.content: Prices shown are indicative ranges including VAT. No surcharge is applied for evenings, weekends or holidays. Payment is exclusively online: upon booking, the maximum amount is pre-authorised on the customer's card. After the job, the artisan enters the actual price and only that amount is charged. The difference is automatically released. An invoice is sent by email within 48 hours.

article5.title: Article 5 – Guarantees
article5.content: All work carried out by CasaFix network artisans comes with a 1-year guarantee on parts and labour. A free return visit is arranged within 48 hours for any related issues. Partner artisans carry professional liability insurance.

article6.title: Article 6 – Liability
article6.content: CasaFix acts as an intermediary and is not directly responsible for the quality of work, though it commits to selecting qualified and insured professionals.

article7.title: Article 7 – Personal Data
article7.content: CasaFix complies with GDPR and Spanish LOPD regulations. Data collected is used solely for service operation and is never shared with third parties without consent.

article8.title: Article 8 – Intellectual Property
article8.content: All elements of the Application are protected by intellectual property law. Reproduction without authorisation is prohibited.

article9.title: Article 9 – Applicable Law
article9.content: These Terms are governed by Spanish law. Disputes shall be submitted to the competent courts of Málaga, Spain.

article10.title: Article 10 – Amendments
article10.content: CasaFix reserves the right to modify these Terms at any time. Continued use of the Application constitutes acceptance of the updated Terms.

privacy.dataContent: CasaFix collects the following personal data: name, surname, email, phone number and location. This data is necessary for service operation, in compliance with GDPR and Spanish LOPD.
privacy.cookiesContent: The application uses functional and analytical cookies. You can modify your preferences at any time.
privacy.rightsContent: You have the right to access, rectify, delete and port your data. Contact: contact@casafix.es. You may also file a complaint with the Spanish AEPD.

paymentSettings.secureDesc: All payments are protected by Stripe, the world leader in online payments
paymentSettings.preauthDesc: Only the actual amount is charged after the service. The rest is automatically released
paymentSettings.invoiceDesc: Automatically receive your invoice by email after each service
paymentSettings.methodNote: Your card is securely saved during your first booking

help.faq1a: When booking, the maximum amount is pre-authorised on your card. After the service, only the actual price set by the artisan is charged. The difference is automatically released.
help.faq2a: Once a booking is confirmed, a €75 displacement fee applies. You may however decline the work and only pay the displacement fee. This system prevents cancellation abuse while leaving you the choice.
help.faq3a: All services are covered by a 1-year guarantee on parts and labour. If you have an issue, contact us.
help.faq4q: How do I report a problem?
help.faq4a: From your booking page, you can report a problem. Our team will review your case within 24 hours.
help.faq5a: All artisans are verified, insured for professional liability, and hold the required qualifications.
